name: open_placer_checkpoint
full_help:
open_placer_checkpoint

Description: 
Open Placer Checkpoint

Syntax: 
open_placer_checkpoint  [-phase <arg>] [-continue] [-quiet] [-verbose]
                        <directory>

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-phase]     Placer Checkpoint Name
  [-continue]  Continue placement from checkpoint opened in interactive mode
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  <directory>  Design checkpoint directory
               Values: A directory name with alphanumeric characters

Categories:

arguments.description: Continue placement from checkpoint opened in interactive mode
Suspend message limits during command execution
